name: Venom: Lethal Protector
description: Eddie Brock and the Venom symbiote have relocated to San Francisco, seeking redemption as a lethal protector of the innocent. But the Life Foundation has other plans—spawning new symbiotes to weaponize, forcing Venom to confront twisted reflections of himself.
flavorText: We are Venom. And we protect the innocent—by any means necessary.
